---
title: "Marianne Davys"
---

## Marianne Davys

**Dates:** (1788/9-14 Dec 1858)

**Maiden name:** (Mapletoft)

### Description

childhood friend of FMY

### Biography

She married (1814) Rt. Rev. Dr. George Davys,  [his ODNB entry]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 22 1899

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
